chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.15 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.205/2023 (stay) 01.02.2023 Mr. Rehan Kayani, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Faheem Zia Abrar, Advocate for Respondents No.1&2. Mr. Shah Bakht Pirzada, Advocate for Respondent No.3..-.-.-.-.-. We were informed by the counsel appearing for Respondent No.3 that a final order has been passed by the Vice Chairman and Chairman Disciplinary Committee, which has been endorsed by the counsel appearing for the Appellant. Hence, in our view present High Court Appeal has become infructuous. The Appellant if aggrieved by the said order, he may avail the legal remedy, if so advised, against the order passed by the Disciplinary Committee, in accordance with law. The present High Court Appeal stands disposed of alongwith the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE SM
